description.en-US: LoRaWAN (Class A) converter with configurable sensor inputs — the readings depend on the attached probe. Readings are sent as LoRaWAN uplinks (sensor data on FPort 2, device status on FPort 5).
description.pt-BR: Conversor LoRaWAN (Classe A) com entradas de sensor configuráveis — as leituras dependem da sonda acoplada. As leituras são enviadas como uplinks LoRaWAN (dados no FPort 2, status do dispositivo no FPort 5).
